response.overview: Benedicte doesn't feel like her life has any meaning. Her hobbies are limited to watching movies and sleeping. She hates her job but needs it to survive.On yet an other day that feels like routine, she goes to work and is confronted by a client for a sandwich she made that he didn't like. After being reprimanded by her boss, she does her best to please the client all while checking the time to go home where she can sleep again and return to her fantasy world in which she holds power. This time in her dream, she ties both the client and her boss to a tree and dances around as they struggle to get rid of the ropes. She wakes up again to her alarm ringing... Realizing that she had overslept and was late for work.
response.title: Routine
